canonical_definition: The observable task of completing specific logic puzzles (e.g., Sudoku, Minesweeper) by making valid moves to reach a solution state.
papers: Evaluating the World Model Implicit in a Generative Model
PUZZLES: A Benchmark for Neural Algorithmic Reasoning
